name: @cyanheads/aviation-weather-mcp-server
description: Fetch METARs, TAFs, PIREPs, and SIGMETs/AIRMETs from the NWS Aviation Weather Center via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch METARs, TAFs, PIREPs, and SIGMETs/AIRMETs from the NWS Aviation Weather Center via MCP.
interface.longDescription: Fetch aviation weather from the NWS Aviation Weather Center. Supports METARs, TAFs, PIREPs, SIGMETs and AIRMETs, plus station discovery by region. Deployable as stdio or streamable HTTP.
